name: The Tournament Course at the The Woodlands Country Club
address: 1730 S Millbend Dr, The Woodlands, TX 77380
about: The Tournament Course at The Woodlands Country Club is a premier golf facility located in The Woodlands, Texas. As part of the esteemed country club, it offers a traditional golf experience with well-maintained greens and a challenging layout. The venue caters to golfers seeking a classic club environment with potential amenities and services typical of high-end country clubs. While specific simulator details are unavailable, the country club setting suggests a focus on both on-course and potentially off-course golf activities.
